name: Finds Reports
description:
Finds incidents recorded at an establishment for a given date range. Provides a Finds Detail list (every find, with prisoner involvement where recorded) and Finds Summary dashboards aggregating totals by find type, prisoners involved and drug type.
IR-1575

dataset.name: Finds Incident Detail
dataset.description: Every FIND incident in the date range, including finds with no prisoner involvement.
dataset.query:
WITH qa_pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    q.report_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('67187','65187') THEN
  CASE res.code
    WHEN '218783' THEN 'Multiple types'
    WHEN '216784' THEN 'Multiple types'
    WHEN '218784' THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
    WHEN '216785' THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
    WHEN '218785' THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
    WHEN '216786' THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
    WHEN '218786' THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
    WHEN '216787' THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
    WHEN '218787' THEN 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'
    WHEN '216788' THEN 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'
    WHEN '218788' THEN 'Tobacco / tobacco related items'
    WHEN '216789' THEN 'Tobacco / tobacco related items'
    WHEN '218789' THEN 'Weapon'
    WHEN '216790' THEN 'Weapon'
    WHEN '218790' THEN 'Other reportable items'
    WHEN '216791' THEN 'Other reportable items'
  END
END) AS find_category_new,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49265','51234','51188','57288') AND res.code IN ('195011','198731','196731','209156') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_drug,
MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49274','51242','51196','57296') AND res.code IN ('195045','198783','196783','209208') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_mobile,
MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49289','51255','51209','57309') AND res.code IN ('195084','198874','196875','209297') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_alcohol,
    CAST(LISTAGG(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('67190','67208') THEN
  CASE res.code
    WHEN '218802' THEN 'Unknown'
    WHEN '218966' THEN 'Unknown'
    WHEN '218804' THEN 'Amphetamines'
    WHEN '218967' THEN 'Amphetamines'
    WHEN '218805' THEN 'Barbiturates'
    WHEN '218968' THEN 'Barbiturates'
    WHEN '218806' THEN 'Benzodiazepines'
    WHEN '218969' THEN 'Benzodiazepines'
    WHEN '218807' THEN 'Buprenorphine/subutex'
    WHEN '218970' THEN 'Buprenorphine/subutex'
    WHEN '218808' THEN 'Cannabis'
    WHEN '218971' THEN 'Cannabis'
    WHEN '218809' THEN 'Cannabis plant'
    WHEN '218972' THEN 'Cannabis plant'
    WHEN '218810' THEN 'Cocaine'
    WHEN '218973' THEN 'Cocaine'
    WHEN '218811' THEN 'Crack'
    WHEN '218974' THEN 'Crack'
    WHEN '218812' THEN 'Gabapentin'
    WHEN '218975' THEN 'Gabapentin'
    WHEN '218813' THEN 'Heroin'
    WHEN '218976' THEN 'Heroin'
    WHEN '218814' THEN 'Ketamine'
    WHEN '218977' THEN 'Ketamine'
    WHEN '218815' THEN 'LSD'
    WHEN '218978' THEN 'LSD'
    WHEN '218816' THEN 'Methadone'
    WHEN '218979' THEN 'Methadone'
    WHEN '218817' THEN 'NPS (new psychoactive substances)'
    WHEN '218980' THEN 'NPS (new psychoactive substances)'
    WHEN '218818' THEN 'Pregabalin'
    WHEN '218981' THEN 'Pregabalin'
    WHEN '218819' THEN 'Steroids'
    WHEN '218982' THEN 'Steroids'
    WHEN '218820' THEN 'Tramadol'
    WHEN '218983' THEN 'Tramadol'
    WHEN '218821' THEN 'Tranquilisers'
    WHEN '218984' THEN 'Tranquilisers'
    WHEN '218822' THEN 'Other'
    WHEN '218985' THEN 'Other'
  END
END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.code) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS drug_types,
    CAST(LISTAGG(CASE WHEN q.code = '67203' THEN
  CASE res.code
    WHEN '218947' THEN 'Blunt instrument (cosh, item in sock, etc)'
    WHEN '218948' THEN 'Firearm (fake guns, ammunition, chemical incapacitant etc)'
    WHEN '218949' THEN 'Knife/bladed article'
    WHEN '218950' THEN 'Other'
  END
END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.code) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS weapon_types,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67204' AND res.code = '218952' THEN NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') END) AS other_reportable_comment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67204' AND res.code = '218951' THEN 'Noose / ligature' END) AS other_reportable_noose,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67181' THEN
  CASE res.code
    WHEN '218712' THEN 'Administration'
    WHEN '218713' THEN 'Association area' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218714' THEN 'Cell' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218715' THEN 'Chapel'
    WHEN '218716' THEN 'Court'
    WHEN '218717' THEN 'Dining room' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218718' THEN 'Dormitory' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218719' THEN 'Education'
    WHEN '218720' THEN 'Exercise yard' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218721' THEN 'Gate/gate lodge'
    WHEN '218722' THEN 'Gym'
    WHEN '218723' THEN 'Health care centre'
    WHEN '218724' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'
    WHEN '218725' THEN 'Hospital outside (visiting)'
    WHEN '218726' THEN 'Induction/first night centre'
    WHEN '218727' THEN 'Kitchen'
    WHEN '218728' THEN 'Mail room'
    WHEN '218729' THEN 'Office'
    WHEN '218730' THEN 'Outside working party'
    WHEN '218731' THEN 'Reception'
    WHEN '218732' THEN 'Recess/ roof void'
    WHEN '218733' THEN 'Segregation unit' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218734' THEN 'Showers/changing room' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218735' THEN 'Vehicle used for court/transfer'
    WHEN '218736' THEN 'Visits'
    WHEN '218737' THEN 'Vulnerable prisoners unit (VPU)' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218738' THEN 'Wing' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
    WHEN '218739' THEN 'Workshop'
    WHEN '218740' THEN 'Other' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
  END
END) AS incident_location
  FROM prisons.incidentreporting_question q
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_response res ON res.question_id = q.id
  GROUP BY q.report_id
)
SELECT
  r.location,
  p.name AS location_name,
  r.id,
  r.report_reference,
  r.incident_date_and_time,
  r.title AS incident_title,
  r.description AS incident_details,
  pi.prisoner_number,
  INITCAP(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
  INITCAP(pi.last_name) AS last_name,
  cpr.description AS prisoner_role,
  COALESCE(qa.find_category_new, CASE
  WHEN (COALESCE(qa.found_drug,0) + COALESCE(qa.found_mobile,0) + COALESCE(qa.found_alcohol,0)) > 1 THEN 'Multiple types'
  WHEN qa.found_drug = 1 THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
  WHEN qa.found_mobile = 1 THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
  WHEN qa.found_alcohol = 1 THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
END) AS find_category,
  CASE qa.find_category_new
    WHEN 'Drug / drug equipment' THEN qa.drug_types
    WHEN 'Weapon' THEN qa.weapon_types
    WHEN 'Other reportable items' THEN COALESCE(qa.other_reportable_comment, qa.other_reportable_noose)
    WHEN 'Multiple types' THEN NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(qa.drug_types || ', ', '') || COALESCE(qa.weapon_types, ''), ', $', ''), '')
    ELSE NULL
  END AS find_detail,
  qa.incident_location,
  r.status,
  cs.description AS status_description
FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report r
  JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code
  JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code
  JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
  JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = r.location
  LEFT JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi ON pi.report_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role cpr ON cpr.code = pi.prisoner_role
  LEFT JOIN qa_pivoted qa ON qa.report_id = r.id
WHERE ctf.code = 'FIND' AND r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')

dataset.name: Finds by type
dataset.description: Per find type: number of incidents recorded and number of prisoners involved (incl. nil).
dataset.query:
WITH find_reports_raw AS (
  SELECT
    r.id AS report_id,
    r.location,
    p.name AS location_name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('67187','65187') THEN
  CASE res.code
    WHEN '218783' THEN 'Multiple types'
    WHEN '216784' THEN 'Multiple types'
    WHEN '218784' THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
    WHEN '216785' THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
    WHEN '218785' THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
    WHEN '216786' THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
    WHEN '218786' THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
    WHEN '216787' THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
    WHEN '218787' THEN 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'
    WHEN '216788' THEN 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'
    WHEN '218788' THEN 'Tobacco / tobacco related items'
    WHEN '216789' THEN 'Tobacco / tobacco related items'
    WHEN '218789' THEN 'Weapon'
    WHEN '216790' THEN 'Weapon'
    WHEN '218790' THEN 'Other reportable items'
    WHEN '216791' THEN 'Other reportable items'
  END
END) AS find_category_new,
    MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49265','51234','51188','57288') AND res.code IN ('195011','198731','196731','209156') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_drug,
MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49274','51242','51196','57296') AND res.code IN ('195045','198783','196783','209208') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_mobile,
MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49289','51255','51209','57309') AND res.code IN ('195084','198874','196875','209297') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_alcohol
  FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report r
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
    JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = r.location
    LEFT JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_question q ON q.report_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_response res ON res.question_id = q.id
  WHERE ctf.code = 'FIND'
    AND r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
    AND date(r.incident_date_and_time) >= (SELECT START_DATE from prompt_)
    AND date(r.incident_date_and_time) <= (SELECT END_DATE from prompt_)
  GROUP BY r.id, r.location, p.name
),
find_reports AS (
  SELECT report_id, location, location_name,
    COALESCE(find_category_new, CASE
  WHEN (COALESCE(found_drug,0) + COALESCE(found_mobile,0) + COALESCE(found_alcohol,0)) > 1 THEN 'Multiple types'
  WHEN found_drug = 1 THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
  WHEN found_mobile = 1 THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
  WHEN found_alcohol = 1 THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
END) AS category
  FROM find_reports_raw
),
agg AS (
  SELECT fr.location, fr.location_name, fr.category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fr.report_id) AS incidents_recorded,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pi.prisoner_number) AS prisoners_involved
  FROM find_reports fr
    LEFT JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi ON pi.report_id = fr.report_id
  GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((fr.location, fr.location_name, fr.category), (fr.category))
)
SELECT
  format_datetime((SELECT START_DATE from prompt_), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS start_date,
  format_datetime((SELECT END_DATE from prompt_), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS end_date,
  agg.location,
  agg.location_name,
  cat.label AS find_category,
  COALESCE(agg.incidents_recorded, 0) AS incidents_recorded,
  COALESCE(agg.prisoners_involved, 0) AS prisoners_involved
FROM (VALUES ('Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'), ('Drug / drug equipment'), ('Mobile phone / mobile related item'), ('Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'), ('Tobacco / tobacco related items'), ('Weapon'), ('Other reportable items'), ('Multiple types')) AS cat (label)
  LEFT JOIN agg ON agg.category = cat.label
ORDER BY agg.location_name, cat.label

dataset.name: Drug finds by type
dataset.description: Per drug type: number of incidents where that drug was found (incl. nil).
dataset.query:
WITH drug_rows AS (
  SELECT
    r.id AS report_id,
    r.location,
    p.name AS location_name,
    CASE res.code
      WHEN '218802' THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN '218966' THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN '218804' THEN 'Amphetamines'
      WHEN '218967' THEN 'Amphetamines'
      WHEN '218805' THEN 'Barbiturates'
      WHEN '218968' THEN 'Barbiturates'
      WHEN '218806' THEN 'Benzodiazepines'
      WHEN '218969' THEN 'Benzodiazepines'
      WHEN '218807' THEN 'Buprenorphine/subutex'
      WHEN '218970' THEN 'Buprenorphine/subutex'
      WHEN '218808' THEN 'Cannabis'
      WHEN '218971' THEN 'Cannabis'
      WHEN '218809' THEN 'Cannabis plant'
      WHEN '218972' THEN 'Cannabis plant'
      WHEN '218810' THEN 'Cocaine'
      WHEN '218973' THEN 'Cocaine'
      WHEN '218811' THEN 'Crack'
      WHEN '218974' THEN 'Crack'
      WHEN '218812' THEN 'Gabapentin'
      WHEN '218975' THEN 'Gabapentin'
      WHEN '218813' THEN 'Heroin'
      WHEN '218976' THEN 'Heroin'
      WHEN '218814' THEN 'Ketamine'
      WHEN '218977' THEN 'Ketamine'
      WHEN '218815' THEN 'LSD'
      WHEN '218978' THEN 'LSD'
      WHEN '218816' THEN 'Methadone'
      WHEN '218979' THEN 'Methadone'
      WHEN '218817' THEN 'NPS (new psychoactive substances)'
      WHEN '218980' THEN 'NPS (new psychoactive substances)'
      WHEN '218818' THEN 'Pregabalin'
      WHEN '218981' THEN 'Pregabalin'
      WHEN '218819' THEN 'Steroids'
      WHEN '218982' THEN 'Steroids'
      WHEN '218820' THEN 'Tramadol'
      WHEN '218983' THEN 'Tramadol'
      WHEN '218821' THEN 'Tranquilisers'
      WHEN '218984' THEN 'Tranquilisers'
      WHEN '218822' THEN 'Other'
      WHEN '218985' THEN 'Other'
    END AS drug
  FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report r
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
    JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = r.location
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_question q ON q.report_id = r.id
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_response res ON res.question_id = q.id
  WHERE ctf.code = 'FIND'
    AND r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
    AND q.code IN ('67190', '67208')
    AND res.code IN ('218802', '218966', '218804', '218967', '218805', '218968', '218806', '218969', '218807', '218970', '218808', '218971', '218809', '218972', '218810', '218973', '218811', '218974', '218812', '218975', '218813', '218976', '218814', '218977', '218815', '218978', '218816', '218979', '218817', '218980', '218818', '218981', '218819', '218982', '218820', '218983', '218821', '218984', '218822', '218985')
    AND date(r.incident_date_and_time) >= (SELECT START_DATE from prompt_)
    AND date(r.incident_date_and_time) <= (SELECT END_DATE from prompt_)
),
agg AS (
  SELECT location, location_name, drug,
    COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS incidents_recorded
  FROM drug_rows
  GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((location, location_name, drug), (drug))
)
SELECT
  format_datetime((SELECT START_DATE from prompt_), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS start_date,
  format_datetime((SELECT END_DATE from prompt_), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS end_date,
  agg.location,
  agg.location_name,
  drug.label AS drug_type,
  COALESCE(agg.incidents_recorded, 0) AS incidents_recorded
FROM (VALUES ('Amphetamines'), ('Barbiturates'), ('Benzodiazepines'), ('Buprenorphine/subutex'), ('Cannabis'), ('Cannabis plant'), ('Cocaine'), ('Crack'), ('Gabapentin'), ('Heroin'), ('Ketamine'), ('LSD'), ('Methadone'), ('NPS (new psychoactive substances)'), ('Pregabalin'), ('Steroids'), ('Tramadol'), ('Tranquilisers'), ('Other'), ('Unknown')) AS drug (label)
  LEFT JOIN agg ON agg.drug = drug.label
ORDER BY agg.location_name, drug.label

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query: select prison_id, name prison_name FROM prisons.prisonregister_prison p where p.active = true order by name

dataset.name: Incident Status
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status where code NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT') order by description

dataset.name: Prisoner role
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role order by description

dataset.name: Find categories
dataset.query:
SELECT 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment' AS code, 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Drug / drug equipment' AS code, 'Drug / drug equipment' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Mobile phone / mobile related item' AS code, 'Mobile phone / mobile related item' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)' AS code, 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Tobacco / tobacco related items' AS code, 'Tobacco / tobacco related items' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Weapon' AS code, 'Weapon' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Other reportable items' AS code, 'Other reportable items' AS description
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Multiple types' AS code, 'Multiple types' AS description
ORDER BY description

action: location IN (${caseloads}) OR location IS NULL

report.name: Finds Detail
report.description: List of FIND incidents for the selected establishment(s) and date range, including finds not associated with a prisoner.

dashboard.name: Finds Summary
dashboard.description: Summary of finds for the selected establishment(s) and date range: totals by find type and number of prisoners involved per type.

visualisation.display: Number of incidents recorded by find type
Number of prisoners involved by find type

dashboard.name: Finds Summary - Drugs
dashboard.description: Summary of drug finds for the selected establishment(s) and date range: number of incidents per drug type.

visualisation.display: Number of drug find incidents by drug type
